_comment: Android update manifest. Each release: bump versionCode in build.gradle.kts AND here, then upload the APK with: gh release upload current Wander.apk --repo faisal-nabulsi/wander-site --clobber (binaries are NOT committed to this repo).
notes: Big anti-ban + stability update: a soft-ban cooldown timer with a live 'safe to catch/spin' countdown; a speed governor that caps movement below ban-triggering speeds; GPS 'breathing' so a parked location looks natural instead of frozen; a one-tap setup checklist that deep-links you to fix Location Accuracy, mock-app and battery settings; and clearer error/tunnel help.
